statement: In every magma, Equation 89 (`x = y * (z * (y * w))`) implies Equation 1060 (`x = x * ((y * (z * y)) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0192
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op y (op z y)) y))
